title: Egyptian Nutty Rice Bowl
description: A simple and delicious bowl dish made with nutty Egyptian rice, stir-fried with a hint of shattering crunch.
instructions: Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the shattering and cook until golden brown.
Add the Egyptian rice and stir-fry until the rice is lightly toasted.
Add the nutty and cook for another minute.
Transfer the rice mixture to a bowl and serve hot.
Garnish with a sprinkle of shattering on top.
